chains.title: Subdomain Discovery to Vulnerability Scan
chains.description: Find subdomains, probe for live hosts, then scan for vulnerabilities. The most common bug bounty pipeline.

chains.title: Port Scan to Service Exploitation
chains.description: Discover open ports and services, then search for matching exploits. Classic pentest workflow.

chains.title: Web Crawl to Parameter Discovery
chains.description: Crawl a web app, extract parameters from archived URLs, then fuzz them for hidden endpoints.
chains.command: katana -u https://target.com -jc -d 3 | sort -u | tee urls.txt && cat urls.txt | grep '=' | ffuf -w - -u FUZZ

chains.title: AD Recon to Domain Admin
chains.description: Map Active Directory attack paths, extract Kerberos tickets, then move laterally to domain admin.

chains.title: Email to Full OSINT Profile
chains.description: Start with an email address and build a complete profile: registered accounts, phone, social media, and data breaches.
chains.command: holehe target@email.com && theharvester -d email.com -b all && sherlock username

chains.title: Container Scan to Escape
chains.description: Scan container images for vulnerabilities, check runtime config, then test for escape paths.

chains.title: WiFi Handshake Capture to Crack
chains.description: Capture WPA handshakes from nearby networks, then crack them offline with GPU acceleration.

chains.title: Wallet Address to Transaction Graph
chains.description: Index blockchain data locally, then trace fund flows and cluster related addresses.

chains.title: APK Decompile to Secret Extraction
chains.description: Decompile an Android APK, search for hardcoded secrets, then hook the app at runtime to bypass protections.
chains.command: apkleaks -f app.apk && jadx -d output/ app.apk && frida -U -l hook.js com.target.app

chains.title: Cloud Asset Discovery to Exploitation
chains.description: Enumerate cloud resources, find exposed storage buckets and misconfigured IAM, then simulate attacks.

chains.title: Log Analysis to Forensic Timeline
chains.description: Parse Windows event logs for suspicious activity, then build a visual timeline for the investigation.
chains.command: hayabusa csv-timeline -d logs/ -o timeline.csv && log2timeline.py plaso.dump logs/

chains.title: Domain Typosquat Detection to Analysis
chains.description: Generate domain permutations, check which are registered, then capture screenshots for evidence.
chains.command: dnstwist -r -w domain.com | tee results.csv && eyewitness --web -f urls.txt
